---
title: "database.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/intel/database.ts"
loc: 100
complexity: 8
logic_score: 6.30
style_score: 3.60
intel_score: 6.40
overall_score: 4.20
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://better-sqlite3)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [*](file://node:fs)
- [AgentPing](file://../types.js)

### Exports
- `db`
- `getDb`
- `getDb`
- `statsDir`
- `dbPath`
- `registerSpoke`
- `registerSpoke`
- `database`
- `normalizedRepo`
- `spokeName`
- `spoke`
- `stmt`
- `result`
- `savePing`
- `savePing`
- `sanitizedAgentId`
- `validActions`
- `sanitizedAction`
- `spokeId`
- `database`
- `oneHourAgo`
- `session`
- `stmt`
- `result`
- `insertPing`
- `getSessionsWithSummaries`
- `getSessionsWithSummaries`
- `database`
- `normalizedRepo`
- `sessions`
- `duration`
- `targetFile`
- `getSessionPings`
- `getSessionPings`
- `database`
